login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to your CDC Platform account
login.genericError: Unable to log in. Please check your credentials and try again.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If that email is registered, a reset link has been sent.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
resetPassword.successMessage: Password updated successfully! Redirecting you to login.
resetPassword.invalidToken: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Join the CDC Platform
register.genericError: Unable to create your account. Please try again.

pendingApproval.title: Your account is pending approval
pendingApproval.message: An administrator needs to review your account before you can access the platform. We'll notify you once it's approved.

verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email has been confirmed. You can now use all platform features.
verifyEmail.missingToken: This link is missing a verification token.
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: A new verification email has been sent.
verifyEmail.resendError: Unable to resend the verification email. Please try again.
